scripts.all: npm ci && npm run-script preparedevenv && npm run-script build
scripts.build: npm run-script updateformsource && npm run-script processcontent && npx mct docsgeneratemarkdown --base-path ./build/workcontent/public/ -i ./build/workcontent/public/data/forms/ -o ./out/msdocs/
scripts.build-int: npm run-script syncres && npm run-script updateformsource-int && npm run-script processcontent-int && npm run-script syncres && npx mctools-int docsgeneratemarkdown --base-path ./build/workcontent/public/ -i ./build/workcontent/public/data/forms/ -o ./out/msdocs/ && npm run-script generatetypes-int && npm run-script generateschema-int
scripts.installlocalmct: npx shx rm -rf packages && npx shx rm -rf ../../minecraft-creator-tools-internal/app/toolbuild/jsn/*.tgz && cd ../../minecraft-creator-tools-internal/app/toolbuild/jsn && npm pack && cd ../../../../minecraft-creator-pr/tools && npx shx mkdir -p packages && npx shx cp ../../minecraft-creator-tools-internal/app/toolbuild/jsn/mctools-int-0.0.1.tgz packages/ && npm i ./packages/mctools-int-0.0.1.tgz
scripts.syncres: npx shx cp -r ../../minecraft-creator-tools-internal/app/reslist/* ./reslist/ && npx shx cp ../../minecraft-creator-tools-internal/app/public/data/mccat.json ./build/workcontent/public/data/ && npx shx mkdir -p ./build/workcontent/public/data/mci && npx shx cp ../../minecraft-creator-tools-internal/app/public/data/mci/preview.mci.json ./build/workcontent/public/data/mci/
